General.Name: Link Holdings Ltd
General.Description: Link Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the hotel business in the People's Republic of China, Singapore, Indonesia, and Japan. It operates through Operation of hotel business and Distressed debt asset management segments. The company also involved in property investment, cottage, and real estate businesses. In addition, it offers distressed debt asset management services. The company was incorporated in 2012 and is headquartered in Sheung Wan, Hong Kong. Link Holdings Limited operates as a subsidiary of Ace Kingdom Enterprises Corporation.
General.Address: Flat I, 16th Floor (Room 1609), Sheung Wan, Hong Kong
